channel.title: Red-Team on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Red-Team on Pi Stack

item.title: Sliver vs Havoc vs Mythic: Best Self-Hosted C2 Framework 2026
item.description: Command and control (C2) frameworks are the backbone of any professional red team engagement. They provide the infrastructure for operators to manage compromised systems, execute commands, exfiltrate data, and move laterally through target networks. While commercial options like Cobalt Strike dominate the market, open-source alternatives have matured significantly and now offer comparable capabilities with full self-hosted control.
